driveFileNames: JIN (BTS) - 구름과 떠나는 여행 (With the Clouds).mp3
lyrics:
Lyric JIN (BTS) - 구름과 떠나는 여행 (With the Clouds)

Romanization

gureumeun oneuldo nae jeombureul dama
kkeuteopsi ieojineun haneul yeohaenghae
seogyangjin noeul, byeori bitnaneun i bam
jageun dugeunggeorim jeomjeom deo keojyeoga

godogui kkeutjarage hollo seo inneun
eodiro gaya halji moreuneun naege
chagapge eoreobuteun chimmuk sogeseo
ne ttaseuhan soksagim, nal jabajun moksori

huimihan gureum soge
namgyeojin heunjeok wien
naega namgin geosilkka
neoui bipbangurilkka

janjanhan haneul sogeul
tteodoneun uri duri
eonjenggan balgeun nareul
hamkke kkumkkugiro hae, yeongwonhi

seotulge soneul daemyeon sarajilkka geobeul naen aiya
yeongwonhi somyeoldoeji anneun yaksogui daneoreul mandeulja

ne seulpeumi damgin nummuri biramyeon
gikkeoi jeoksyeo da gajyeogalge
saehayan ne maeumi geomge muldeulji antorok
sijagui geunalcheoreom

budeureopge gyeoteseo soksagineun sori
euneunhago ttaseuhage geonneneun songgil
seollemeuro gadeuk chan nae sumgyeorui tteollim
i pogeunhan seollemeun jeomjeom deo beonjyeoga

huimihan gieok soge
nareul gamssaaneun chae
geuriun geu songgireun
nareul muldeuryeogane

seuchyeo gan baram kkeute
namgyeojin heunjeok wiro
joyonghi nal ullimyeo
jageun soksagimeuro nal ikkeune

seotulge soneul daemyeon sarajilkka geobeul naen aiya
yeongwonhi somyeoldoeji anneun yaksogui daneoreul mandeulja

ne seulpeumi damgin nummuri biramyeon
gikkeoi jeoksyeo da gajyeogalge
saehayan ne maeumi geomge muldeulji antorok
sijagui geunalcheoreom

Hangeul

구름은 오늘도 내 전부를 담아
끝없이 이어지는 하늘 여행해
석양진 노을, 별이 빛나는 이 밤
작은 두근거림 점점 더 커져가

고독의 끝자락에 홀로 서 있는
어디로 가야 할지 모르는 내게
차갑게 얼어붙은 침묵 속에서
네 따스한 속삭임, 날 잡아준 목소리

희미한 구름 속에
남겨진 흔적 위엔
내가 남긴 것일까
너의 빗방울일까

잔잔한 하늘 속을
떠도는 우리 둘이
언젠간 밝은 날을
함께 꿈꾸기로 해, 영원히

서툴게 손을 대면 사라질까 겁을 낸 아이야
영원히 소멸되지 않는 약속의 단어를 만들자

네 슬픔이 담긴 눈물이 비라면
기꺼이 적셔 다 가져갈게
새하얀 네 마음이 검게 물들지 않도록
시작의 그날처럼

부드럽게 곁에서 속삭이는 소리
은은하고 따스하게 건네는 손길
설렘으로 가득 찬 내 숨결의 떨림
이 포근한 설렘은 점점 더 번져가

희미한 기억 속에
나를 감싸안은 채
그리운 그 손길은
나를 물들여가네

스쳐 간 바람 끝에
남겨진 흔적 위로
조용히 날 울리며
작은 속삭임으로 날 이끄네

서툴게 손을 대면 사라질까 겁을 낸 아이야
영원히 소멸되지 않는 약속의 단어를 만들자

네 슬픔이 담긴 눈물이 비라면
기꺼이 적셔 다 가져갈게
새하얀 네 마음이 검게 물들지 않도록
시작의 그날처럼

driveFileNames: JIN (BTS) - Don’t Say You Love Me.mp3
lyrics:
Lyric JIN (BTS) - Don’t Say You Love Me

Romanization

I really thought I made up my mind
Hopped in the car and put it in drive
I tried to leave like a hundred times
But something’s stopping me every time
Oh

Faking a smile while we're breaking apart
Oh I never never never meant to take it this far
Too late to save me so don’t even start
Oh you never meant to hurt me
but you're making it hard

Don’t tell me that you’re gonna miss me
Just tell me that you wanna kill me
Don’t say that you love me
‘cause it hurts the most
You just gotta let me go

I really thought this was for the best
It never worked last time that I checked
I got this pain stuck inside my chest
And it gets worse the further I get
Oh

Faking a smile while we're breaking apart
Oh I never never never meant to take it this far
Too late to save me so don’t even start
Oh you never meant to hurt me
but you're making it hard

Don’t tell me that you’re gonna miss me
Just tell me that you wanna kill me
Don’t say that you love me
‘cause it hurts the most
You just gotta let me go

Lie to me, tell me that you hate me
Look me in the eyes and call me crazy
Don’t say that you love me
‘cause it hurts the most
You just gotta let me go

Let me go
Gotta let me go
Gotta let me
Don’t say that you love me
‘cause it hurts the most
You just gotta let me go

Hangeul

I really thought I made up my mind
Hopped in the car and put it in drive
I tried to leave like a hundred times
But something’s stopping me every time
Oh

Faking a smile while we're breaking apart
Oh I never never never meant to take it this far
Too late to save me so don’t even start
Oh you never meant to hurt me
but you're making it hard

Don’t tell me that you’re gonna miss me
Just tell me that you wanna kill me
Don’t say that you love me
‘cause it hurts the most
You just gotta let me go

I really thought this was for the best
It never worked last time that I checked
I got this pain stuck inside my chest
And it gets worse the further I get
Oh

Faking a smile while we're breaking apart
Oh I never never never meant to take it this far
Too late to save me so don’t even start
Oh you never meant to hurt me
but you're making it hard

Don’t tell me that you’re gonna miss me
Just tell me that you wanna kill me
Don’t say that you love me
‘cause it hurts the most
You just gotta let me go

Lie to me, tell me that you hate me
Look me in the eyes and call me crazy
Don’t say that you love me
‘cause it hurts the most
You just gotta let me go

Let me go
Gotta let me go
Gotta let me
Don’t say that you love me
‘cause it hurts the most
You just gotta let me go
